title: THE TWIDDLERS Wooden Christmas Nutcracker Soldier 30cm / 12" - Handmade Pine Wood Figure in Red, Silver & White - Traditional Festive Ornament with Moving Mouth for Mantelpiece and Table Centrepiece
features: CLASSIC CHRISTMAS AESTHETIC – Dressed in a traditional red, silver, and white uniform and holding a festive wreath, this 12-inch soldier adds timeless charm to any indoor Christmas display. It functions as a nostalgic focal point that complements modern and vintage decor themes.

INTERACTIVE MOVING PARTS – Features a traditional lever mechanism at the back that opens and closes the mouth. Note: Designed primarily as a decorative ornament, this figure captures the authentic look of a nutcracker without being intended for cracking hard shell nuts.

STURDY PINE CONSTRUCTION – Handcrafted from premium pine wood and mounted on a solid, weighted base, this figure is capable of standing securely on windowsills, shelves, or fireplaces without toppling. The durable build ensures it can be stored and reused for many Christmas seasons.

SYMBOL OF GOOD LUCK – Historically believed to protect the home and bring good fortune, this nutcracker serves as a meaningful addition to family traditions. It acts as a sophisticated alternative to plastic decorations, adding a touch of European folklore to your home.

VERSATILE GIFT & DISPLAY – Standing at 30cm (12"), it is perfectly proportioned to serve as a dinner table centrepiece or a stocking filler gift for collectors. The intricate hand-painted details make it a standout piece for office parties or winter weddings.
SATISFACTION GUARANTEED - The Twiddlers is proud to offer 100% warranty on our wooden nutcracker figures. If for any reason you're not completely satisfied, let us know and we will be happy to help.
description: Product Description Handcrafted Christmas is a time of magic and our wooden soldiers capture that spirit perfectly - they're symbols of the joy and fellowship that the season brings. Countdown to Christmas! Count down to Christmas with our nutcrackers that keep time and cracks smiles! Our Nutcracker Christmas decorations include various size options, from miniature collectibles to life-size editions in a variety of styles, to suit all types of spaces. Paint It Yourself! Unleash your creativity and paint your own nutcracker, make it truly one-of-a-kind and crackin' fine! Versatile Our Nutcracker Christmas decorations include various size options, from miniature collectibles to life-size editions, to suit all types of spaces. Moving Mouths Adorned in traditional colours, our wooden Christmas decorations will effortlessly blend in with your seasonal decor, the moving mouths will bring the character to life, and children will be enchanted by their fun expressions, while adults will appreciate the nostalgia they bring. Gift Boxed Elegantly presented in a stunning gift box—perfect for gifting in the holiday season.
